earn.headline: Gba owo bi o ṣe n ka
earn.body: Ka awọn iwe ati awọn nkan kikọ. Gba awọn aaye fun gbogbo iṣẹju ti akoko kika ti a fọwọsi.

study.headline: Yi eto ẹkọ rẹ pada si awọn ibeere
study.body: Gbe awọn ohun elo ẹkọ rẹ. AI wa yoo ṣẹda awọn ibeere, awọn kaadi iranti, ati awọn ibeere adaṣe laarin awọn iṣẹju-aaya.

wallet.headline: Gba owo tabi lo premium
wallet.body: Yi awọn aaye rẹ pada si Naira nipasẹ Flutterwave, tabi ṣii premium fun kika laisi awọn ipolowo ati awọn aaye × 2.

streak.headline: Ka lojoojumo, gba diẹ sii
streak.body: Kọ itẹsiwaju ọjọ 7. Ṣii awọn isọdipupo aaye afikun ni igba ti o ba ti n ka ni itẹle.

premium.headline: Awọn aaye × 2, ko si awọn ipolowo
premium.body: Ṣii premium fun kika laisi awọn ipolowo, ṣe ilọpo meji awọn aaye rẹ, ki o si gba awọn ohun elo ẹkọ AI ailopin.

subscription.title: Alabapin
subscription.info: A ṣakoso awọn alabapin nipasẹ ile itaja ohun elo rẹ. Awọn ayipada yoo bẹrẹ lẹsẹkẹsẹ.
subscription.alert_message:
Lati ṣakoso alabapin rẹ, lọ si awọn eto ẹrọ rẹ:

Android: Google Play Store → Alabapin
iOS: Eto → Apple ID → Alabapin
